top_signals.title: Dallas Fed President Logan calls for 'modestly' higher interest rates
top_signals.summary: The policymaker said this week's good inflation news wasn't good enough.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Baltic Exchange joins China Maritime Day Forum for launch of 2026 Xinhua-Baltic Index
top_signals.summary: The 13th edition of the Xinhua-Baltic International Shipping Centre Development Index (ISCDI) was officially launched in Shanghai on 10 July during this year’s China Maritime Day Forum. Produced in partnership between Baltic Exchange and Xinhua News Agency, the annual report brings together the latest analysis of the world’s leading international shipping centres. Read the full ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Nvidia unveils new AI model and expands Japan’s physical AI ecosystem
top_signals.summary: Nvidia announces new AI model, Cosmos 3 Edge, and expansion of its physical AI ecosystems in Japan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Small Business Bank and announces termination enforcement actions with BNP Paribas S.A., BNP Paribas USA, Inc., BNP Paribas Securities Corp., and Community Bankshares, Inc.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Small Business Bank and announces termination enforcement actions with BNP Paribas S.A., BNP Paribas USA, Inc., BNP Paribas Securities Corp., and Community Bankshares, Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Paschi Casts Doubts On Intesa Bid, Urges Studying BPM Plan
top_signals.summary: Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA expressed broad concerns over a takeover bid by Intesa Sanpaolo SpA while highlighting perceived benefits in a rough rival pitch presented by Banco BPM SpA.

top_signals.title: Japan maglev project faces calls to clarify timeline after decade of delays
Here's why the housing market is hurting so much this summer
top_signals.summary: Mortgage rates are high, home prices at record levels and consumers stressed. These are all contributing to a drop in existing home sales and builder sentiment.

top_signals.title: Φreceives an order from HD KSOE for the tank design of two new LNG Carriers
top_signals.summary: GTT announces that it has received, in the second quarter of 2026, an order from HD Korea Shipbuilding & Offshore Engineering (HD KSOE[1]) for the tank design of two new Liquefied Natural Gas Carriers (LNGCs). The LNGCs will be built by the shipyard HD Hyundai Heavy Industries, each with a capacity of 174,000 m³. The ...

top_signals.title: England semi pulls in 24m on BBC but falls short of Euros final
top_signals.summary: BBC coverage of England getting dumped out of the World Cup broke 2026 records but fell short of other football matches in historical rankings. Around 24m watched Argentina’s late 2-1 win in Atlanta, making the match the most-watched live television moment of the year. The broadcast averaged 22.1m viewers on the BBC with the channel’s [...]

top_signals.title: Trump’s longtime teleprompter operator accused of using insider knowledge to place bets on Kalshi: ABC News
top_signals.summary: President Trump's teleprompter is under scrutiny following a report alleging that he used insider knowledge to place bets on Kalshi.
